purpose: Sapient species + Earth humans on Tunya. Each species defines (a) physical morphology for the procgen character generator, (b) cultural / religious / governance distinctions, (c) reproductive compatibility with other species, (d) procgen visual cues that mark power level on the body.

taxonomy.naturalized_population: earth_human (seven ark cohorts; 4 generations of intermixing have made most of them >50% Tunyan-blooded by Year 4G)

ancient_tunyan.estimated_population: small. Pure-blood Tunyans rare. Mixed-blood Tunyans common across Masond and the kingdoms generally.

morphology.build: tall, large-boned, calloused hands characteristic of stoneworkers even in non-stoneworking lineages
morphology.skin_color_origin: warm earth-tones in the original pure population (ochres, deep browns, slate-grays). Mixing with arrivals produces the full Tunyan spectrum (see colors.json).
morphology.eyes: dark, often yellow-flecked iris in pure-blood individuals
morphology.distinctive_marker: pure Tunyans have a faint subdermal marbling pattern only visible in direct sunlight. Mixed-bloods retain it in fragments. The marbling shifts with the planetary refusal-field's local density.

biology.power: no bloodline power. Conduit-status for the planetary refusal-field — see powers.json#tunyan_conduit.

reproductive_compatibility.with_earth_human: fully compatible; common and largely successful — most kingdoms outside Nil are 30-70% Tunyan-blooded by 4G
reproductive_compatibility.with_sanguire: compatible. Rare in practice (Sanguire culture isolates). Hybrids are recognizable by faint marbling under fur.
reproductive_compatibility.with_medici: no documented case. Mating customs of both species discourage. Theoretically biologically possible. Open lore.

culture.governance: Nil — Grove-mother lineage; mostly leaderless/oral elsewhere
culture.religion: the Field. Pure Tunyans do not personify it. Mixed-bloods sometimes do.

medici.status_on_planet: stranded — crashed ~100 Tunyan years ago; ship unrepairable
medici.estimated_population: small (low thousands). Confined to Medici Isle off Kree's coast and small wards in Kree-allied kingdoms.

lifespan.pure: 150-200 Tunyan years; Supreme Elder typically the longest-lived
lifespan.mate_absorption_extends: absorbing a deceased mate's healing capacity adds 10-25 years to the survivor's life

male.skull: elongated cone, GROWS WITH HEALING SKILL — the cone's height is a visible power-level marker. A junior healer's skull is barely peaked; the Supreme Elder's is dramatically elongated.
male.finger_anatomy: all five fingers the same length
male.eyes: large, often pale gold or silver
male.tongue: carries glands on the upper surface that taste the air (chemoreception) — used for diagnosis and for environmental reading
male.phallus: knotting (mates lock during the act — biological correlate of mate-for-life pairing)
male.headwear_taboo: must cover head in public except at home or during holiday communions. Skull elongation is intimate biological information.

female.finger_anatomy: all six fingers the same length
female.tongue: secretes either poison OR antidotes voluntarily — the discrimination between the two is a learned skill of the species. Used in healing (antidote) and rare combat (poison).
female.skin_hair: hairless on body; hair on head GROWS WITH POWER LEVEL — a junior healer's hair is short; an elder's hair is to the floor. Cutting Medici female hair is taboo and physically painful.
female.headwear_taboo: no taboo for females; long hair displayed freely is the cultural signature

morphology.skin_color_palette: Medici skin tone is a soft pearlescent gray-white in the pure species. Cross-species skin-color genetics (see colors.json) produce a distinctive 'pearl-blended' shade in any mixed-Medici offspring — pearl + the partner's color, blended.

biology.power: healing only. See powers.json#healing_bloodline. The Resonance Choir is a healing focus practice, not a combat ability. Earlier drafts of this bible incorrectly attributed ice powers; canon corrects.
biology.mate_for_life: Medici pair-bond once per lifetime. Bond formation is irreversible and biologically attested by the male knotting and the female's chemical signature shift.
biology.mate_death_absorption: When a bonded Medici dies, the survivor absorbs the dead mate's healing capacity, becoming a tier-jump elder. This is the canonical path to elder-tier power. Premature partner-death (assassination, sabotage) to gain power is the deepest taboo in Medici culture.
biology.supreme_elder_succession: When the Supreme Elder dies, all remaining elders gather around the body. Mercury's chosen-soul transfers to the next leader. The new Supreme Elder gains full healing potency, the home-world memory chain, and the species' ceremonial knowledge.

reproductive_compatibility.with_sanguire: asymmetrically lethal — see powers.json#sanguire_medici_hybrid. Medici-female + Sanguire-male = lethal pregnancy. Medici-male + Sanguire-female = viable but rare and culturally taboo (preserves the Medici male breeding pool).
reproductive_compatibility.with_earth_human: viable in theory; documented cases exist. Children carry attenuated healing (1/2 to 1/4 of pure expression). The Medici discourage but do not forbid.
reproductive_compatibility.with_ancient_tunyan: no documented case. Theoretically possible. Open lore.

culture.governance: Supreme Elder, chosen by Mercury at the previous Elder's death. Elders' council under the Supreme Elder. Egalitarian below the elder tier.
culture.religion: Mercury (see deities.json). Do not believe in Tunyan gods.
culture.external_role: The Supreme Elder represents the Medici when other lands of TunYah convene.
culture.venturing_practice: Medici venture off Medici Isle to heal the sick and trade healing services for food. They do not stay long in foreign kingdoms; the isle is the only true home.

homeworld_lore.name: open lore — held in Supreme Elder succession memory
homeworld_lore.have_they_tried_to_signal_home: open lore — no answer received in 100 Tunyan years

sanguire.status_on_planet: Kree-arrived. The Kree state arrived on Tunya before the Earth arks. Sanguire is one of the species making up the Kree polity. Their homeland within Kree is Sandrun.
sanguire.estimated_population: moderate. Concentrated in Sandrun. Sanguire-descended populations in Kree's other regions (mixed with other Kree species, with Earth-arrival populations, with Ancient Tunyan).

male.build: wide shoulders and wide hips, heavily muscled

fur_coverage.torso_legs: thick, dense fur layer (procgen shader: high density, long pile)
fur_coverage.arms_face_feet: thinner fur (procgen shader: low density, short pile)
fur_coverage.color_correlation: fur color is the male's underlying skin color saturated and slightly darker. Visible at a glance for genealogy reading.

male.phallus_anatomy_lore_only: double phallus per source. Held in lore-only material; not surfaced in mainline content unless you flip a flag.
male.fire_expression_visible: when invoking fire bloodline, hands and breath visibly heat-shimmer. At full potency, palms glow ember-orange.

female.average_height_meters: TBD — source document did not include Sanguire female description. Flagged for follow-up.
female.fingers: TBD (likely 6 by analogy to males, but unconfirmed)
female.OPEN_LORE: Sanguire female morphology is awaiting the next batch of source material from the user.

morphology.skin_color_palette: Sanguire skin tone in the pure species spans warm reds, ambers, and ochres. Cross-species offspring follow Tunyan blending genetics (see colors.json).

biology.power: fire bloodline. See powers.json#fire_bloodline. Visible heat-shimmer when invoked; full potency: ember-orange glow on palms and ash-flecked breath.

reproductive_compatibility.with_other_sanguire: fully compatible. Sanguire culture organizes around clan-internal mating with displays of strength as courtship.
reproductive_compatibility.with_medici: asymmetrically lethal — see species.medici.biology.reproductive_compatibility.with_sanguire above and powers.json#sanguire_medici_hybrid
reproductive_compatibility.with_earth_human: viable. Hybrids carry attenuated fire and slightly increased lifespan. Common among Kree-state populations of mixed Sanguire-arrival heritage.
reproductive_compatibility.with_ancient_tunyan: viable. Hybrids carry attenuated fire AND partial conduit-status. The two interfere — fire output drops in proximity to other Tunyan-blooded individuals.

culture.governance: Warlord-led clan structure. Three primary clans in Sandrun. Warlord chosen by ritual duel during Cull (winter month).
culture.religion: Pre-Tunyan deity-set carried over from Kree origin. Names not commonly shared with outsiders.
culture.external_role: The warlord of Sandrun represents the Sanguire to other Tunyan kingdoms. The Kree state separately represents the broader polity.

earth_human.common_name: the Arrivals (collectively); per-kingdom names by lineage
earth_human.status_on_planet: naturalized via four generations of intermixing with Ancient Tunyans and (less commonly) Sanguire and Medici
earth_human.estimated_population: majority of the planet's settled population by Year 4G

morphology.build: Earth-human normal range, with strong regional variation matching the original ark cohort (Sahm-descended typically tall and broad-shouldered; Bahiij-descended typically lithe; Aekon-descended muscular; etc.)
morphology.skin_color_palette: now spans the full Tunyan spectrum due to four generations of intermixing. Pure-Earth-human skin tones (the original ark cohorts' palette) are increasingly rare. See colors.json.

biology.power: no native bloodline power. Trace fire or healing potency present in some lineages via Sanguire or Medici ancestry.

reproductive_compatibility.with_ancient_tunyan: fully compatible — the dominant cross-species pairing on Tunya by population

culture.governance: by kingdom of settlement. See factions.json.
culture.religion: by kingdom — typically a mix of carried Earth traditions + emergent Tunyan practices.

mercury.manifestation: active. Manifests primarily through Supreme Elder succession — Mercury's chosen-soul transfer at the previous Elder's death is the only confirmed manifestation.

iconography.sigil_motif: an eight-faceted teardrop (the Supreme Elder's tear at succession)
iconography.temples: one true temple on Medici Isle. Smaller shrines in the Medici wards of Kree-allied kingdoms.
festivals: holiday_communion (the only event where Medici males uncover their heads in public; once per Tunyan year, on Cares-day-1)

doctrine: Mercury chose the Medici. The Medici chose to remain Mercury's people after the crash.
Healing is the duty Mercury imposed in exchange for the species' survival.
Mate-for-life is Mercury's gift; mate-death absorption is Mercury's mercy.
The Supreme Elder is Mercury's voice. Mercury speaks through the Elder; the Elder does not speak for Mercury.
open_lore: Whether Mercury is the Medici home world's deity or a different entity that found them post-crash is open lore.
Whether Mercury can manifest beyond Supreme Elder succession is open lore — pilgrims report vivid dreams in the temple, but no confirmed event.

tunyan_field.manifestation: always-present passive force. Conducted by pure Tunyans. Refuses sustained electrical current. Dampens hostile intent.
tunyan_field.iconography: no fixed iconography in the pure Tunyan tradition — the Field is felt, not depicted. Mixed-blood traditions occasionally personify it as a feminine figure called 'the Watcher Beneath.'
tunyan_field.open_lore: Whether the Field has anything resembling intent is the deepest open question in Tunyan philosophy.

morph_targets_per_skeleton: medici_male: cone_height_0_to_3 (drives skull elongation as healing skill grows)
medici_female: hair_length_0_to_floor (drives hair length as power grows)
shader_passes: sanguire_fur_shader (high-density torso/legs, low-density arms/face/feet, color = saturated/darker version of skin)
tunyan_marbling_shader (subdermal pattern, only visible in direct sunlight; intensity scales with refusal-field local density)
fire_bloodline_invoke (palm + breath heat-shimmer; ember-glow at full potency)
healing_bloodline_invoke (cool air shimmer around hands; faint white halo at full potency)
procgen_character_generator_hooks.skin_color_inheritance_engine: see colors.json for the paint-mixing genetics + sex-linked override probability + the per-kingdom palette priors that bias procgen NPCs toward a kingdom-recognizable look while still spanning the full Tunyan spectrum.
